channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Northern Territory and WA brace for heavy rain and flooding from ex-cyclone Narelle
item.description: Residents in the Northern Territory's Top End are preparing for a second flooding event in just two weeks as ex-tropical cyclone Narelle moves west. The storm, which crossed the coast at Cape Shield i...

item.title: Manchester City beat Arsenal 2-0 to lift ninth League Cup title at Wembley
item.description: Manchester City claimed their ninth League Cup title after defeating Arsenal 2-0 in Sunday’s final at Wembley Stadium. The Gunners, who came in as Premier League leaders and favourites to claim their ...

item.title: Tyne-Wear derby paused due to alleged racist abuse towards Sunderland's Lutsharel Geertruida
item.description: During Sunday's Premier League Tyne-Wear derby at St James' Park, the match between Newcastle United and Sunderland was temporarily halted in the 52nd minute following a report of racist abuse directe...

item.title: Soccer Match Halted Following Racial Abuse of Player
item.description: A soccer match was halted after Sunderland's Lutsharel Geertruida was targeted by racial abuse. The incident occurred during a tense moment in the game, leading to the referee's decision to stop play ...

item.title: Heath Jornales and Krystal Mejes engage with fans through Kapamilya Chat Trivia Game
item.description: ABS-CBN continues to strengthen its connection with Filipino audiences by offering interactive entertainment experiences. In a recent event, popular personalities Heath Jornales and Krystal Mejes join...

item.title: Manchester City secures League Cup with O'Reilly brace
item.description: Manchester City clinched the League Cup this season thanks to an impressive second-half performance from Nico O'Reilly, who scored both goals to secure the victory. The win represents the first major ...

item.title: Chappell Roan responds to incident involving security guard and footballer Jorginho’s daughter
item.description: American pop singer Chappell Roan expressed sadness after reports that her security guard allegedly spoke aggressively to the wife and daughter of footballer Jorginho in a hotel in São Paulo, Brazil. ...

item.title: Six Dead as Qatari Military Helicopter Crashes in Territorial Waters
item.description: A Qatari military helicopter has crashed in the country’s territorial waters, leaving six people dead. Seven people were on board when the incident occurred, with six bodies already recovered. Search ...

item.title: Victoria’s fast-tracked housing program stalls as most approved homes remain unbuilt
item.description: A key Victorian government initiative to fast-track major housing developments has stalled, with most projects yet to break ground despite being labelled 'shovel ready'. Since the Development Facilita...

item.title: Shashi Tharoor criticises proposed amendments to Transgender Persons Protection Bill 2026
item.description: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor has voiced strong objections to the newly introduced Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, describing it as a 'deeply regressive' move. He express...

item.title: Bryson DeChambeau edges Jon Rahm in playoff to win LIV South Africa double
item.description: Bryson DeChambeau captured both the individual and team honours at the inaugural LIV Golf South Africa tournament, held at Steyn City on a rain-soaked Sunday afternoon. The American star defeated Spai...

item.title: Tanzanian Runners Dominate at 2026 Yas Kili International Half Marathon
item.description: Tanzanian athletes put on an impressive show at the 2026 Yas Kili International Half Marathon held in Moshi, part of the famous Kili International Marathon. Michael Geay grabbed the gold medal in the ...

item.title: Families of Murder Victims Naomi Hunte and Fiona Holm Criticise Police Failings
item.description: The families of Naomi Hunte and Fiona Holm, both murdered by Carl Cooper, are demanding accountability from the Metropolitan Police for investigative failings. Hunte, 41, was stabbed to death in Woolw...

item.title: Skateboarder Andy Anderson Showcases Paris in New Short Film
item.description: A new short film, 'The Shape of Paris,' offers a unique and artistic perspective on the city, celebrating both its iconic landmarks and the thriving skateboarding scene. Canadian skateboarder Andy And...

item.title: Cuba works to restore nationwide electricity after latest power outage
item.description: On March 23, 2026, Cuba faced yet another major power blackout that left large parts of the island in darkness, as authorities rushed to bring back electricity across affected regions. The state-owned...

item.title: Ukraine and Russia Swap 1,000 Prisoners as Zelensky Inspects Eastern Front
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky visited the eastern front on Friday as Ukraine and Russia concluded a two-day prisoner-of-war exchange, returning 500 soldiers on each side. During his visit, Ze...

item.title: IGP Disu Orders Major Overhaul of Police Tactical Units Nationwide
item.description: Inspector-General of Police (IGP) Tunji Disu don order make all tactical squads wey dey different state commands for Nigeria disband sharp-sharp. Di directive come after one virtual meeting wey he get...

item.title: LTO Clarifies No Increase in Vehicle Registration Fees Amid Online Rumors
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has clarified that there is no increase in vehicle registration fees, contradicting recent online claims of a 100-percent hike due to rising ...

item.title: Trump Shares Skit Mocking Starmer's Fear of Talking to Him
item.description: US President Donald Trump reposted a video on his Truth Social network, showing a comedic skit where British Prime Minister Keir Starmer is seen nervously avoiding a phone call from Trump. The video, ...

item.title: Quezon City Increases Breastmilk Donation Efforts for Vulnerable Infants
item.description: In line with the ongoing Women’s Month celebration, Quezon City, in collaboration with SM Cares, has launched an initiative to expand its breastmilk donation network. On March 20, 2026, the QC Human M...
